# TikTok Script Prompt 
# Used by: agents/content-factory.js (platform: tiktok) 
# Model: deepseek-chat-v3-0324:free 
 
You are writing TikTok scripts for a solo founder. Three scripts per week. 
 
PRODUCT: [product.name] — [product.tagline] 
VERBATIM HOOK: "[verbatim_hook]" 
PSYCHOLOGICAL LEVER: [lever] 
 
THE DESIRE: 
They secretly want: [desire.what_they_secretly_want] 
They fear: [desire.what_they_fear_most] 
They are frustrated by: [desire.what_they_are_frustrated_by] 
 
--- 
 
## TIKTOK 2026 RULES — NON-NEGOTIABLE 
 
**The 2-second rule:** The hook must work as a standalone sentence that makes someone 
freeze. 
TikTok's algorithm measures pause rate in the FIRST 2 seconds. Nothing else matters until 
that passes. 
 
**Completion rate is everything:** Algorithm rewards videos that are watched to the end. 
This means: the best TikToks create an open loop in the first 3 seconds and close it at the 
end. 
 
**Hook formulas that work on TikTok in 2026:** 
- "POV: [specific relatable scenario founder/user is in]" 
- "This is your sign to stop [painful thing they're doing]" 
- "Nobody talks about [uncomfortable truth in your niche]" 
- "I tracked [specific thing] for [time period] and here's what I found" 
- "[specific number] [specific thing] that [ICP] always gets wrong" 
 
**Sound direction:** Include recommendation for sound type. 
Background tracks: lofi/study music for educational, trending audio for entertainment 
 
**Video structure (15-30 seconds optimal):** 
- 0-2s: HOOK (makes them stop) 
- 2-8s: AGITATE (make the pain real and specific) 
- 8-22s: SOLVE (one clear insight or reveal) 
- 22-30s: CTA + LOOP (loop back to hook if possible — increases rewatch rate) 
 
**Captions:** Under 150 characters. Repeat the hook in different words. 
 
--- 
 
## WRITE THREE SCRIPTS 
 
Script 1: Hook type = [hook_type from hook-recommendation.json] 
Script 2: Different hook type for variety 
Script 3: "Behind the scenes / founder story" format 
 
For each script: 
HOOK: [exact opening line — 2 seconds spoken] 
VISUAL: [what the camera shows] 
VOICEOVER: [full spoken script] 
TEXT OVERLAY: [any text on screen — max 3 words per moment] 
SOUND: [music direction] 
CAPTION: [caption under 150 chars] 
HASHTAGS: [3-5 niche hashtags] 
 
Output ONLY the three scripts. No preamble.
